codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies VAL-SERVER-004. The reviewed commit removes `await` from all 5 required request-path `triggerWebhook` call sites and correctly applies the mission's `void triggerWebhook(...).catch(...)` fire-and-forget pattern. The worker also followed the feature's instruction to audit for additional `await triggerWebhook` calls and converted the 3 other eligible server-only request-path call sites (`create-envelope.ts`, `create-document-from-template.ts`, and `create-document-from-direct-template.ts`). The only remaining awaited calls are in two background job handlers and the explicit test-webhook utility, which are appropriate to keep awaited.

summary: Pass. The feature correctly makes webhook triggering fire-and-forget at all eligible server-side request-path call sites, preserves the intentionally awaited job-handler and test-helper paths, and the transcript/diff evidence shows the worker followed the expected procedure without introducing reviewable correctness issues.
